user.title: GoodVibes Daemon
user.description: Connect to a GoodVibes daemon with SDK 0.27.3 Home Assistant surface enabled. The Home Assistant long-lived access token is configured in the daemon as surfaces.homeassistant.accessToken; this integration stores the daemon URL, daemon bearer token, webhook secret, event type, and Home Graph settings. Assist conversation turns use the remote-chat /api/homeassistant/conversation endpoint.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the GoodVibes daemon.
error.invalid_auth: The daemon rejected the bearer token.
error.surface_missing: The daemon Home Assistant surface is not available. Enable featureFlags.homeassistant-surface and surfaces.homeassistant.enabled.

abort.already_configured: This GoodVibes daemon is already configured.

home_graph_unavailable.title: GoodVibes Home Graph is unavailable
home_graph_unavailable.description: The GoodVibes daemon Home Graph endpoint is unavailable: {error}

home_graph_issues.title: GoodVibes Home Graph has unresolved issues
home_graph_issues.description: GoodVibes reported {count} unresolved Home Graph issue(s). Check the Home Graph issues sensor or call goodvibes.home_graph_issues for details.
